title: American attitudes about government and politics
description: Explain the relationship between core beliefs of US citizens and attitudes about the role of government
topic_path: American attitudes about government and politics | 4.1
American attitudes about government and politics

assessment_items.question_content:
** Which of the following policies is most likely to cause tension between the competing values of equality of opportunity and limited government?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Mandating that all public schools have English language programs
Decreasing funding for national defense programs
Banning religious prayer in public schools
Reducing environmental regulations

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between the competing values of equality of opportunity and free enterprise? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Raising the minimum wage to \$15
Increasing environmental regulations
Decreasing funding to the National Endowment for the Arts
Limiting marriage to heterosexual couples

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between the competing values of equality of opportunity and rule of law?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Enacting a policy that punishes immigrants seeking asylum who attempt to enter the United States without documentation
Requesting the financial records for the Department of Veterans Affairs
Increasing regulations on banking practices
Instituting paid family leave in all businesses

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between the competing values of rule of law and limited government?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Expelling undocumented US residents from the country
Raising the minimum wage to \$15
Increasing funding to the National Endowment for the Arts
Collecting metadata from phone calls under the Patriot Act

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between the competing values of rule of law and limited government?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Investigating  journalists who have published news stories critical of  the administration
Implementing a corporate policy that places women in leadership roles
Decreasing funding for national defense programs
Requesting the financial records for the Environmental Protection Agency

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between the competing values of rule of law and limited government?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Seizing library records to investigate potential terrorists
Passing “right to work” legislation that lets people choose whether they want to join a labor union
Reviewing presidential nominations for a cabinet position in a Senate hearing
Requesting the financial records for the Environmental Protection Agency

assessment_items.question_content:
** Which of the following policies would create the most 
tension between competing interpretations of limited 
government and individualism? **

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Increasing regulations on the sale of automatic weapons
Expanding the national defense system
Requiring all businesses to provide paid family leave
Increasing funding for school lunch programs

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between the competing values of individualism and limited government?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Banning religious prayer in public schools
Decreasing funding to the National Endowment for the Arts
Increasing funding for school lunch programs
Requiring all businesses to provide paid family leave

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is most likely to cause tension between the competing values of individualism and rule of law?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Criminalizing the use of recreational drugs like marijuana
Reducing environmental regulations
Increasing funding for school lunch programs
Mandating all public schools have English-language programs

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between the competing values of free enterprise and rule of law?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Increasing regulations on banking practices
Criminalizing speech that is considered racist on social media
Implementing a corporate policy that places women in leadership roles
Passing laws that require that voters use a state-issued identification card

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between free enterprise and equality of opportunity?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Passing an "equal pay for equal work" law to reduce differences in pay for women and men
Increasing funding for space exploration
Decreasing regulations on the sale of automatic weapons
Criminalizing the use of recreational drugs like marijuana

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following policies is likely to create the most tension between free enterprise and rule of law?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Reducing environmental regulations for oil companies
Banning religious prayer in public schools
Raising the age to qualify for Social Security benefits to reduce the federal deficit
Enacting mandatory minimum sentences for non-violent offenses
